pattern_en: Kitchen body quoted at list price or less than 20% off
pattern_ja: キッチン本体が定価のまま or 定価の20%OFF未満で計上
reason_en: Industry standard trade purchase is 50-60% off list. List-price quoting is overpricing.

pattern_ja: 一般家庭なのにハイグレード（リシェル・セントロ等）強く推奨
reason_en: Mid-grade sufficient for 90%+ of households. Forces 700K-1.5M JPY excess for vendor margin.

pattern_en: Pushing layout change when same-position would suffice
pattern_ja: 同位置交換で済む案件に壁付け→対面式レイアウト変更を強く推奨
reason_en: Adds 500K-1M JPY for piping/interior re-work, inflating margin.

pattern_en: 'Mandatory' bundling of dishwasher / water purifier / IH
pattern_ja: 食洗機・浄水器・IHを『セット必須』として抱き合わせ
reason_en: All optional. Dishwasher alone adds 150-300K JPY.

pattern_en: Mid-grade I-type same-position quote over 1.5M JPY
pattern_ja: ミドルI型 同位置交換で¥1,500,000超

pattern_en: Mid-grade I-type same-position quote over 2M JPY
pattern_ja: ミドルI型 同位置交換で¥2,000,000超
ミドルペニンシュラ化で¥2,500,000超

pattern_en: Manufacturer / series / model / grade not specified
pattern_ja: キッチンメーカー・シリーズ名・型番・グレード不明
reason_en: LIXIL Sierra-S vs Richelle differ by over 1M JPY. Ambiguity is fraud territory.

pattern_en: Water/gas/duct work lumped as single line item
pattern_ja: 給排水・ガス・ダクト工事が『一式』計上
reason_en: Per-item itemization possible. Lumping facilitates overpricing.

pattern_en: Same-position replacement bundled with full floor/wall/ceiling redo
pattern_ja: 同位置交換なのに床・壁・天井の全面張替えを抱き合わせ
reason_en: Same-position usually requires only partial floor patching. Full redo adds 200-400K JPY.

pattern_ja: ガス接続工事を無資格者が担当
reason_en: Gas Equipment Installation Supervisor license is legally required.

pattern_ja: 電気工事を無資格者が兼務
reason_en: Class-2 Electrician license is legally required.

pattern_en: Layout change without disclosing hidden costs (piping/electric/gas relocation)
pattern_ja: レイアウト変更の隠れコスト（配管・電気・ガス移設）説明なし
reason_en: Layout changes add 300-800K JPY for relocations. Pre-disclosure required.
